case_title: INTERNATIONAL JEWELERS CORPORATION VS CANCHE,JORGE et al

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL JEWELERS CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANCHE,JORGE CANCHE, ROBERTO JOSE IGNACIO CUCON AKA JOSE IGNACIO COCON JOSE H DZIB & JOSE MATEO CANL $1,017.00 PRINCIPAL, $302.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,319.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
